prompt: Extreme macro close-up of raw green coffee beans flowing slowly into a metal hopper. Shallow depth of field, 100mm lens, soft bokeh background. Natural morning sunlight, cinematic lens grain, realistic textures, 4k, ultra-realistic.

Side view of a vintage industrial coffee roasting machine. Golden glowing flames visible underneath the drum. Wisps of white smoke rising gracefully. Warm amber lighting, metallic reflections, industrial minimal style, cinematic photography, high detail.

Macro slow motion shot of thousands of dark roasted roasted coffee beans falling from the roaster into a circular cooling tray. Real-world physics, beans bouncing naturally, steam rising from the hot beans, rich dark textures, realistic shadows, 4k.

A pair of weathered, expert hands lifting a handful of dark roasted coffee beans from a cooling tray to inspect them. Detailed skin textures, macro shot of the oily beans, natural movement, no distortions, realistic hand anatomy, industrial workshop background.

Cinematic shot of a premium Kraft paper bag with 'Sài Gòn Bold' label being filled with fresh roasted coffee beans. Warm directional lighting, elegant shadows, dark brown and cream color palette, professional advertising photography look, 4k.
